header_title: Comma Real Estate - Where decisions begin with clarity and continue with value
slogan: We do not begin by asking what can be sold, but whether the decision truly serves the client's long-term objectives.
newsletter_description: Receive thoughtful insights on real estate investment and market opportunities.
filter_description: Refine your search with advanced filters
hero_slogan: risk is not always in making a decision, but often in not pausing long enough before making one.
hero_quote: We do not begin by asking what can be sold, but whether the decision truly serves the client's long-term objectives.
quick_search_description: Search through our curated selection of premium properties in Abu Dhabi
about_description_1: Comma Real Estate is a UAE-based real estate brokerage and advisory firm operating across Abu Dhabi and the wider United Arab Emirates. We provide fully integrated real estate solutions built on deep market understanding, local insight, and a strong advisory mindset.
about_description_2: We view real estate not merely as an asset, but as a financial, strategic, and personal decision. Our services span the full real estate lifecycle—from brokerage and transactions, to developer sales, secondary market resales, property management, and tailored real estate advisory.
about_highlight: We do not begin by asking what can be sold, but rather whether the decision truly serves the client's long-term objectives.
about_description_3: What distinguishes Comma Real Estate is our consultative-first approach. With a strong presence of national talent within our team, we invest in building local expertise that enhances trust, market understanding, and sustainable relationships. Comma Real Estate is not just a brokerage. It is a calm space for thinking within a fast-moving market—where investors pause, assess, and move forward with confidence.
properties_description: Discover our carefully curated selection of premium residential, commercial, and investment properties. Each property reflects our commitment to quality and value.
emiratisation_hero_title: Emiratisation Program: Empowering UAE Nationals for a Sustainable Future
emiratisation_hero_subtitle: At Comma Real Estate, we proudly support the UAE's Emiratisation initiative by empowering young Emirati talents and creating meaningful career opportunities within the private sector.
emiratisation_hero_cta: Learn More About Our Emiratisation Program
emiratisation_about_para1: Emiratisation is a national initiative launched by the UAE government to increase the participation of Emirati nationals in the private sector. The program focuses on developing local talent, enhancing professional skills, and creating sustainable career paths for UAE citizens.
emiratisation_about_para2: At Comma Real Estate, Emiratisation is more than a requirement — it is a long-term commitment. We believe in investing in Emirati youth, nurturing their growth, and empowering them to take active roles in shaping the future of the real estate sector.
emiratisation_about_highlight: We are committed to investing in Emirati youth, nurturing their growth, and empowering them as future leaders of the real estate industry.
emiratisation_commitment_1_desc: Providing comprehensive training programs and career development initiatives designed to help Emirati professionals excel in the real estate industry.
emiratisation_commitment_2_desc: Creating a supportive and inclusive workplace where every Emirati talent feels valued, respected, and empowered to contribute their best.
emiratisation_commitment_3_desc: Offering mentorship from industry experts and senior professionals who guide and support the development of our Emirati team members.
emiratisation_commitment_4_desc: Enabling Emirati professionals to grow into leadership roles and take active roles in strategic decision-making processes.
emiratisation_commitment_5_desc: Aligning business goals with national development objectives to ensure sustainable growth for both individuals and the organization.
emiratisation_commitment_6_desc: Strengthening national identity within the private sector by celebrating Emirati achievements and contributions to the economy.
emiratisation_objective_1_desc: Provide real-world professional experience and hands-on learning opportunities for young Emirati talents entering the real estate sector.
emiratisation_objective_2_desc: Enhance technical and soft skills through comprehensive training, certifications, and knowledge transfer programs led by experienced professionals.
emiratisation_objective_3_desc: Support sustainable, long-term employment opportunities that provide career stability and growth potential for Emirati professionals.
emiratisation_objective_4_desc: Build a strong sense of national pride and belonging within the private sector, fostering Emirati leadership and innovation.
emiratisation_objective_5_desc: Align with the UAE's long-term economic vision by nurturing talent that drives economic diversification and private sector excellence.
emiratisation_talents_intro: We are proud of the talented Emirati professionals who are part of our journey. Their ambition, dedication, and fresh perspectives play a vital role in our continued success.
emiratisation_initiatives_description: As part of our Emiratisation program, we actively participate in training sessions, career workshops, awareness initiatives, and team-building activities designed to enhance professional development and strengthen collaboration.
emiratisation_partners_description: Our success in supporting Emiratisation is driven by strong partnerships with government entities, training institutions, and strategic organizations that share our vision of empowering Emirati talent.
emiratisation_cta_title: Join Our Team of Emirati Experts
emiratisation_cta_description: At Comma Real Estate, we are committed to empowering Emirati talent and building a sustainable future. If you are a motivated Emirati professional looking to grow your career in real estate, we invite you to explore opportunities with us.
emiratisation_cta_info: Discover how you can contribute to our vision and develop your expertis
emiratisation_page_description: Discover Comma Real Estate's commitment to Emiratisation. Learn about our programs, talented Emirati professionals, and initiatives supporting UAE nationals in the real estate sector.

about_page.title: About Comma Real Estate
about_page.subtitle: Where decisions begin with clarity and continue with value.
about_page.philosophy_quote: In real estate, risk is not always in making a decision, but often in not pausing long enough before making one.
about_page.philosophy_description: A comma is not an ending, nor a beginning. It is a moment of pause, a conscious transition between one thought and the next, and between one stage and another in an investor's journey. At Comma Real Estate, we believe that sound real estate decisions are not rushed, not driven by impulse, but shaped by clarity, insight, and honest advice.
about_page.who_we_are_description: Comma Real Estate is a UAE-based real estate brokerage and advisory firm operating across Abu Dhabi and the wider United Arab Emirates. We provide fully integrated real estate solutions built on deep market understanding, local insight, and a strong advisory mindset. We view real estate not merely as an asset, but as a financial, strategic, and personal decision.
about_page.services_subtitle: Comprehensive real estate services tailored to your needs

brokerage.title: Real Estate Brokerage
brokerage.description: Buying and selling residential, commercial, and land assets across Abu Dhabi and the UAE, with a focus on true asset value rather than headline pricing.

developer_sales.title: Developer Sales & Project Marketing
developer_sales.description: Strategic sales and marketing support for developers, aligning product positioning with market demand and investor expectations.

resales.title: Secondary Market Resales
resales.description: Advisory-led resale services, supported by timing analysis, market trends, and risk assessment to optimise outcomes.

property_management.title: Property & Building Management
property_management.description: Professional management services aimed at preserving asset value, improving operational efficiency, and ensuring seamless owner and tenant experiences.

advisory.title: Real Estate Advisory
advisory.description: Independent, analysis-driven advisory services that help clients make informed decisions aligned with medium- and long-term goals.

about_page.approach_description: At Comma Real Estate, decisions are shaped through thoughtful process, not pressure. Our approach begins with understanding our client's objectives – investment, residential, or operational – followed by a careful reading of the market, available options, and associated risks. We do not offer recommendations unless we believe they genuinely serve the client's best interest. We do not proceed with transactions unless the full picture is clear.
about_page.talent_description: At Comma Real Estate, we believe that the sustainability of the real estate sector is not achieved solely through projects and returns, but through the people behind each decision. For this reason, attracting and developing national talent is a fundamental part of our corporate identity—not a temporary initiative or a promotional message. We actively encourage Emiratis to enter the real estate brokerage profession and provide them with structured internal training programs focused on:

talent_points.deep_understanding: Deep understanding of the local real estate market

about_page.who_we_serve_description: Comma Real Estate works with clients who understand that a real estate decision is not a momentary step, but part of a broader vision that requires deep understanding and careful market insight. We serve individuals and investors who seek: real estate decisions grounded in trusted local knowledge; solutions that go beyond buying and selling to long-term planning; a high level of discretion, precision, and professional conduct. We support our clients from within the UAE and beyond, accompanying them throughout every stage of their real estate journey—whether for residential, investment, or asset management purposes.
about_page.vision_description: To be a trusted real estate knowledge house, contributing to the creation of more informed real estate decisions and reinforcing a culture of thoughtful, well-considered choice within the real estate market.
about_page.mission_description: To deliver integrated real estate solutions grounded in deep market understanding, honest advisory, and professional execution, enabling our clients to make decisions that serve their objectives today and preserve their value for the future.

values.trust: Trust: The foundation of every relationship and our highest priority to build and sustain
values.clarity: Clarity: Sound decisions begin with accurate, transparent information
values.local_insight: Local Insight: Deep understanding of the market and its context
values.responsibility: Responsibility: Toward our clients, the sector, and the wider community
values.sustainability: Sustainability: Decisions built today to endure tomorrow

about_page.closing: In a world of accelerated decisions, we believe that pausing has become essential. Real estate is not a number, nor a momentary transaction, but a decision with long-term impact. That is why Comma Real Estate exists to be the thoughtful pause, the clear perspective, and the confident transition forward.

emiratisation.label: Emiratisation
emiratisation.title: National Talent & Sustainability
emiratisation.intro: At Comma Real Estate, we believe that the sustainability of the real estate sector is not achieved solely through projects and returns, but through the people behind each decision. We actively encourage Emiratis to enter the real estate brokerage profession.

ahmed.name: Ahmed Al Mansoori
ahmed.description: Ahmed joined Comma Real Estate as part of the Emiratisation program and has demonstrated strong leadership skills and deep market understanding. He actively contributes to client relations and operations.

fatima.name: Fatima Al Kaabi
fatima.description: Fatima brings fresh perspectives and entrepreneurial drive to the real estate sector. Her dedication to client satisfaction has made her an essential part of our growing team.

mohammed.name: Mohammed Al Mazrouei
mohammed.description: Mohammed's expertise in property management and community engagement has strengthened our operational excellence. He embodies the values of dedication and professionalism.

emiratisation_partners.label: Our Partners
emiratisation_partners.title: Strategic Collaborations
emiratisation_partners.description: We work closely with government entities, educational institutions, and industry leaders to support Emiratisation and develop local talent in the real estate sector.
